answers: Flower arrangement basics: use odd numbers, vary heights, mix textures, and choose a focal flower with filler flowers.
Tips: cut stems at 45° angle, remove leaves below waterline, change water every 2 days, and add flower food.
Design rules: start with greenery base, add focal flowers, fill gaps with smaller blooms, and check from all angles.
Ful sajano tips: bibhinno uchchota r rang misao, fresh pani r ful er khabar dao, ar 2 din por por pani change koro.
